basic_details.job_title: DLSA Karbi Anglong Driver Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: District Legal Services Authority Karbi Anglong
basic_details.short_information: District Legal Services Authority Karbi Anglong (DLSA Karbi Anglong) has released the official Driver Recruitment 2026 Notification on 16 May 2026 at karbianglongjudiciary.gov.in. A total of 01 vacancy has been announced under the DLSA Karbi Anglong Driver Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates aged 18 years and above with a Class VIII Pass qualification can apply through offline mode on or before 08 June 2026. The official notification PDF and application form details are available below.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DLSA Karbi Anglong Driver Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: karbianglongjudiciary.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 08-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DLSA Karbi Anglong Driver Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to receive applications for the DLSA Karbi Anglong Driver Recruitment 2026 is 08-06-2026. Ensure your application reaches the authority by this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum age requirement for the Driver post?
faq.answer: The minimum age requirement for the Driver post is 18 years. Candidates must meet this age criterion to be eligible for the recruitment.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Driver position?
faq.answer: The required educational qualification for the Driver position is Class-VIII Pass. Candidates must have completed at least Class VIII to apply.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Driver post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Driver post will receive a salary of Rs. 15,000 per month. This is a contractual position.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Driver post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Driver post in the District Legal Services Authority Karbi Anglong recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the form and send it via post.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Driver recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Driver recruitment includes a Skill Test and a Viva Voce. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their performance in these stages.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for the DLSA Karbi Anglong Driver Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q9. What is the official website for DLSA Karbi Anglong?
faq.answer: The official website for District Legal Services Authority Karbi Anglong is karbianglongjudiciary.gov.in. You can find more information and download forms here.

faq.question: Q10. What documents are required to be submitted with the application form?
faq.answer: Candidates need to attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates along with the application form.
